title: Midjourney Cheat Sheet
description: Quick guide for generating images using Midjourney AI.

commands.description: Generates an image of a fantasy landscape.
commands.scenario: When you need a creative background for a project.

commands.description: Produces an image of a futuristic city.
commands.scenario: When designing a sci-fi themed presentation.
When you want unique art for a personal project.

commands.command: Visualize a concept in abstract form
commands.description: Generates an abstract image based on a concept.
commands.scenario: When brainstorming ideas and need visual inspiration.

commands.description: Produces an image styled as a vintage poster.
commands.scenario: When you need a retro look for an event flyer.

commands.description: Generates an image of a character for a children's book.
commands.scenario: When developing visuals for a children's story.

commands.command: Craft a logo for a new brand
commands.description: Creates a logo design for branding purposes.
commands.scenario: When starting a new business and need a logo.
When you want simple, clean art for a project.

commands.description: Creates a highly detailed, realistic image.
commands.scenario: When you need lifelike visuals for a presentation.
When designing visuals for a Halloween event.

commands.description: Generates an image of a character in comic style.
commands.scenario: When illustrating a comic book or graphic novel.

commands.description: Creates a pattern based on natural elements.
commands.scenario: When you need a nature-themed design for textiles.

commands.description: Generates an image depicting a historical event.
commands.scenario: When creating educational materials about history.

commands.description: Creates an image of a creature from fantasy.
commands.scenario: When designing characters for a fantasy game.

commands.description: Creates a seamless pattern that can be repeated infinitely for textures or wallpapers.
Character Reference: Maintains consistent character features across different prompts and scenes.
Style Reference: Mimics the specific aesthetic, color palette, and mood of an uploaded image.
Allows you to select a specific part of a generated image to repaint or modify without changing the rest.
Increases the variation and unexpectedness of the initial four results for more creative experimentation.
